recap: Fragment 1 covered launch week: self-service account block/reactivate + email-OTP web login, an unawaited-insert bug that instantly logged users out, PostHog analytics across the API/frontend/6 bots, and the week's biggest scare - milestone transactions finalizing the whole project on one phase's release, fixed and ported for parity across all 5 bot platforms. Fragment 2: Peter built the entire admin dashboard overnight in one sitting - 10 new pages, dispute auto-routing with workload balancing, SLA reminders, fraud queue, analytics - then immediately hit two bugs, a TypeScript build break from Supabase's promise types and a cross-domain cookie bug that locked him out of his own login. Both fixed same night. Next chapter: the admin panel gets redesigned for real (it shipped functional but ugly).
